---
title: "iid_effects_residuals"
format: html
editor: source
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, results = "markup")

## packages
pkgs <- c(
  "tidyverse", "RColorBrewer", "patchwork", "tidybayes", "parallel", "future",
  "here", "rstantools", "brms"
)
vapply(
  pkgs, library, logical(1), character.only = TRUE, logical.return = TRUE
)

## plot settings
theme_set(
  theme_bw() +
    theme(text = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"), 
          title = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
          legend.position = "bottom")
)

## Set options (removed mc.cores = , as I now put this in the model fit function)
options(
  brms.backend = "cmdstanr",
  future.fork.enable = TRUE,
  future.rng.onMisuse = "ignore"
)

## Detect machine capabilities
parallel::detectCores()  # Should be 28

supportsMulticore()

plan(multicore)
```

# 1. read in models

```{r}
#| label: read-models

b1_drift <- readRDS("models/b1_drift.rds")
b2_drift_res <- readRDS("models/b2_drift_res.rds")

b1_thresh <- readRDS("models/b1_thresh.rds")
b2_thresh_res <- readRDS("models/b2_thresh_res.rds")
```

# 2. drift rate posterior predictions 

## wrangle 

```{r}
#| label: ppreds-drift-wrangle

# --- all newdata grids ---

# b1: face only
newdata_b1 <- expand_grid(
  condition = factor(
    c("learned.false", "learned.true", "novel.false", "novel.true"),
    levels = c("learned.false", "learned.true", "novel.false", "novel.true")
  ),
  face = seq(-15, 15, by = 1)
)

# b2: face + car at three car levels
newdata_b2 <- expand_grid(
  condition = factor(
    c("learned.false", "learned.true", "novel.false", "novel.true"),
    levels = c("learned.false", "learned.true", "novel.false", "novel.true")
  ),
  face = seq(-15, 15, by = 1),
  car = c(-8, 0, 8)
)

# --- get posterior preds ---
preds_b1 <- newdata_b1 |>
  add_epred_draws(b1_drift, ndraws = 1000) |>
  mutate(
    stimulus = if_else(str_detect(as.character(condition), "novel"), "novel", "learned"),
    accuracy = if_else(str_detect(as.character(condition), "true"), "true", "false"),
    stimulus = factor(stimulus, levels = c("learned", "novel")),
    accuracy = factor(accuracy, levels = c("false", "true")),
    model    = "Face only"
  )

preds_b2_res <- newdata_b2 |>
  add_epred_draws(b2_drift_res, ndraws = 1000) |>
  mutate(
    stimulus = if_else(str_detect(as.character(condition), "novel"), "novel", "learned"),
    accuracy = if_else(str_detect(as.character(condition), "true"), "true", "false"),
    stimulus = factor(stimulus, levels = c("learned", "novel")),
    accuracy = factor(accuracy, levels = c("false", "true")),
    model = "Face + Car",
    car_label = factor(car,
      levels = c(-8, 0, 8),
      labels = c("Low car (-8)", "Average car (0)", "High car (+8)")
    )
  )

# filter b2 at car = 0 only (for direct comparison with b1)
preds_b2_car0 <- preds_b2_res |> filter(car == 0)

# shared y range across all predictions
y_range_drift <- range(c(preds_b1$.epred, preds_b2_res$.epred))

# --- contrast data ---
contrasts_drift <- bind_rows(
  preds_b1 |>
    filter(face %in% c(-15, 15)) |>
    ungroup() |>
    mutate(face_level = if_else(face == 15, "high", "low")),
  preds_b2_car0 |>
    filter(face %in% c(-15, 15)) |>
    ungroup() |>
    mutate(face_level = if_else(face == 15, "high", "low"))
) |>
  select(model, condition, stimulus, accuracy, .draw, .epred, face_level) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = face_level, values_from = .epred) |>
  mutate(
    diff  = high - low,
    model = factor(model, levels = c("Face only", "Face + Car"))
  )

# discrimination (true - false) per condition at high vs low face
discrim_contrast <- bind_rows(
  preds_b1 |>
    filter(face %in% c(-15, 15)) |>
    ungroup() |>
    mutate(face_level = if_else(face == 15, "high", "low"), car = 0),
  preds_b2_car0 |>
    filter(face %in% c(-15, 15)) |>
    ungroup() |>
    mutate(face_level = if_else(face == 15, "high", "low"))
) |>
  select(model, stimulus, accuracy, .draw, .epred, face_level) |>
  # create a combined key so we pivot both dimensions at once
  mutate(key = paste(accuracy, face_level, sep = "_")) |>
  select(-accuracy, -face_level) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = key, values_from = .epred) |>
  mutate(
    discrim_high = true_high - false_high,
    discrim_low  = true_low - false_low,
    discrim_diff = discrim_high - discrim_low,
    model        = factor(model, levels = c("Face only", "Face + Car"))
  )

# novel - learned discrimination contrast
# i.e., does face ability affect discrimination more for novel than learned?
learned_novel_contrast <- discrim_contrast |>
  select(model, stimulus, .draw, discrim_diff) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = stimulus, values_from = discrim_diff) |>
  mutate(novel_vs_learned = novel - learned)
```

## plot 

```{r}
#| label: ppreds-drift-plot-1x4

# a quick 1x4 look at the preds
# plot face only model
p_face_1x4 <- ggplot(preds_b1, aes(x = face, y = .epred)) +
  stat_lineribbon(alpha = 0.5, .width = c(.66, .95)) +
  scale_fill_brewer(breaks = rev) +
  facet_wrap(~condition, nrow = 1) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = y_range_drift) +
  labs(
    x = "Face Ability",
    y = "Predicted Drift Rate"
  )

# plot face and car model
p_face_car_1x4 <- ggplot(preds_b2_res, aes(
  x = face, y = .epred,
  color = factor(car)
)) +
  stat_lineribbon(alpha = 0.5, .width = c(.66, .95)) +
  scale_fill_brewer(breaks = rev) +
  facet_wrap(~condition, nrow = 1) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = y_range_drift) +
  labs(
    x = "Face Ability",
    y = "Predicted Drift Rate",
    color = "Car Ability"
  )

(p_face_1x4 / p_face_car_1x4) +
  plot_layout(
    axes = "collect",
    guides = "collect"
  ) &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

ggsave(here("figures", "iid_ppreds", "preds_drift_1x4-res.jpeg"), 
       width = 10, height = 7)
```

```{r}
#| label: ppreds-drift-plot-2x2

plot_preds_2x2 <- function(preds, title) {
  ggplot(preds, aes(
    x = face, y = .epred,
    fill = accuracy, colour = accuracy
  )) +
    stat_lineribbon(alpha = 0.4, .width = c(0.66, 0.95)) +
    scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Dark2") +
    scale_colour_brewer(palette = "Dark2") +
    facet_wrap(~stimulus, nrow = 1) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = y_range_drift) +
    labs(
      title = title,
      x = "Face recognition (centred)", y = "Predicted drift rate",
      fill = NULL, colour = NULL
    ) +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")
}

p_2x2_b1 <- plot_preds_2x2(preds_b1, "Face only model")
p_2x2_b2 <- plot_preds_2x2(preds_b2_car0, "Face & car model")

(p_2x2_b1 | p_2x2_b2) +
  plot_layout(axes = "collect",
              guides = "collect") &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

ggsave(here("figures", "iid_ppreds", "preds_drift_2x2-res.jpeg"), 
       width = 10, height = 7)
```

```{r}
#| label: ppreds-drift-plot-car-levels

plot_preds_carlevel <- function(preds, car_level, title) {
  ggplot(
    preds |> filter(car == car_level),
    aes(x = face, y = .epred, fill = accuracy, colour = accuracy)
  ) +
    stat_lineribbon(alpha = 0.4, .width = c(0.66, 0.95)) +
    scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Dark2") +
    scale_colour_brewer(palette = "Dark2") +
    facet_wrap(~stimulus, nrow = 1) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = y_range_drift) +
    labs(
      title = title,
      x = "Face recognition (centred)", y = "Predicted drift rate",
      fill = NULL, colour = NULL
    ) +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")
}

p_car_lo <- plot_preds_carlevel(preds_b2_res, -8, "Low car (-8)")
p_car_mid <- plot_preds_carlevel(preds_b2_res, 0, "Average car (0)")
p_car_hi <- plot_preds_carlevel(preds_b2_res, 8, "High car (+8)")

(p_car_lo | p_car_mid | p_car_hi) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect", axes = "collect") &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

ggsave(here("figures", "iid_ppreds", "preds_drift_by_car-res.jpeg"), 
       width = 10, height = 7)
```

```{r}
#| label: ppreds-drift-contrasts

p_contrasts_drift <- ggplot(
  contrasts_drift,
  aes(x = diff, y = model, fill = accuracy, colour = accuracy)
) +
  stat_halfeye(alpha = 0.7, .width = c(0.66, 0.95)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "darkgrey") +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Dark2") +
  scale_colour_brewer(palette = "Dark2") +
  facet_wrap(~stimulus, nrow = 1) +
  labs(
    title = "High > low face ability",
    x     = "Difference in predicted drift rate (high > low face)",
    y     = NULL,
    fill  = NULL, colour = NULL
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

p_contrasts_drift

ggsave(here("figures", "iid_ppreds", "preds_drift_contrasts-res.jpeg"), 
       width = 8, height = 6)
```


```{r}
#| label: contrasts-drift-discrimination

# plot discrimination contrast by condition and model
p_discrim_contrast <- ggplot(
  discrim_contrast,
  aes(x = discrim_diff, y = model)
) +
  stat_halfeye(alpha = 0.7, .width = c(0.66, 0.95),
               fill = "skyblue") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "darkgrey") +
  facet_wrap(~stimulus, nrow = 1) +
  labs(
    title = "Change in drift discrimination (true - false) at high vs low face ability",
    x = "Difference in discrimination (high - low face)",
    y = NULL,
    fill = NULL, colour = NULL
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

p_discrim_contrast

ggsave(here("figures", "iid_ppreds", "preds_drift_discrim_contrast-res.jpeg"),
       width = 8, height = 6)
```

```{r}
#| label: contrasts-learned-vs-novel

# novel - learned discrimination contrast
# i.e., does face ability affect discrimination more for novel than learned?
p_learned_novel <- ggplot(
  learned_novel_contrast,
  aes(x = novel_vs_learned, y = model)
) +
  stat_halfeye(alpha = 0.7, .width = c(0.66, 0.95),
               fill = "skyblue") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "darkgrey") +
  labs(
    title = "Novel vs learned: difference in discrimination slope",
    x = "Novel - learned discrimination contrast",
    y = NULL,
    fill = NULL, colour = NULL
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

p_learned_novel

ggsave(here("figures", "iid_ppreds", "preds_drift_novel_vs_learned-res.jpeg"),
       width = 8, height = 6)
```

# 3. threshold posterior predictions

## wrangle

```{r}
#| label: ppreds-thresh-wrangle

# b1: face only
newdata_b1_thresh <- expand_grid(
  response = factor(c("learned", "novel"), levels = c("learned", "novel")),
  face     = seq(-15, 15, by = 1)
)

# b2: face + car
newdata_b2_thresh <- expand_grid(
  response = factor(c("learned", "novel"), levels = c("learned", "novel")),
  face     = seq(-15, 15, by = 1),
  car      = c(-8, 0, 8)
)

preds_b1_thresh <- newdata_b1_thresh |>
  add_epred_draws(b1_thresh) |>
  mutate(model = "Face only")

preds_b2_thresh_res <- newdata_b2_thresh |>
  add_epred_draws(b2_thresh_res, ndraws = 1000) |>
  mutate(
    model = "Face + Car",
    car_label = factor(car,
      levels = c(-8, 0, 8),
      labels = c("Low car (-8)", "Average car (0)", "High car (+8)")
    )
  )

preds_b2_thresh_car0 <- preds_b2_thresh_res |> filter(car == 0)

y_range_thresh <- range(c(preds_b1_thresh$.epred, preds_b2_thresh_res$.epred))

# contrasts
contrasts_thresh <- bind_rows(
  preds_b1_thresh |>
    filter(face %in% c(-15, 15)) |>
    ungroup() |>
    mutate(face_level = if_else(face == 15, "high", "low")),
  preds_b2_thresh_car0 |>
    filter(face %in% c(-15, 15)) |>
    ungroup() |>
    mutate(face_level = if_else(face == 15, "high", "low"))
) |>
  select(model, response, .draw, .epred, face_level) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = face_level, values_from = .epred) |>
  mutate(
    diff  = high - low,
    model = factor(model, levels = c("Face only", "Face + Car"))
  )

# threshold novel - learned gap at high vs low face
thresh_gap_contrast <- bind_rows(
  preds_b1_thresh |>
    filter(face %in% c(-15, 15)) |>
    ungroup() |>
    mutate(face_level = if_else(face == 15, "high", "low")),
  preds_b2_thresh_car0 |>
    filter(face %in% c(-15, 15)) |>
    ungroup() |>
    mutate(face_level = if_else(face == 15, "high", "low"))
) |>
  select(model, response, .draw, .epred, face_level) |>
  mutate(key = paste(response, face_level, sep = "_")) |>
  select(-response, -face_level) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = key, values_from = .epred) |>
  mutate(
    gap_high = novel_high - learned_high,
    gap_low  = novel_low - learned_low,
    gap_diff = gap_high - gap_low,
    model    = factor(model, levels = c("Face only", "Face + Car"))
  )
```

## plot

```{r}
#| label: ppreds-thresh-plots

# drift: colours 1 and 2 from Dark2 (false and true)
# threshold: colours 3 and 4 from Dark2 (learned and novel)
dark2_cols <- RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(8, "Dark2")

thresh_colors <- c("learned" = dark2_cols[3], "novel" = dark2_cols[4])

plot_preds_thresh <- function(preds, title) {
  ggplot(preds, aes(
    x = face, y = .epred,
    fill = response, colour = response
  )) +
    stat_lineribbon(alpha = 0.4, .width = c(0.66, 0.95)) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = thresh_colors) +
    scale_colour_manual(values = thresh_colors) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = y_range_thresh) +
    labs(
      title = title,
      x = "Face recognition (centred)", y = "Predicted threshold",
      fill = "Response", colour = "Response"
    ) +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")
}

p_thresh_b1 <- plot_preds_thresh(preds_b1_thresh, "Face only model")
p_thresh_b2 <- plot_preds_thresh(preds_b2_thresh_car0, "Face & car model")

(p_thresh_b1 | p_thresh_b2) +
  plot_layout(
    axes = "collect",
    guides = "collect"
  ) &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

ggsave(here("figures", "iid_ppreds", "preds_thresh_1x2-res.jpeg"), 
       width = 8, height = 6)
```

```{r}
#| label: ppreds-thresh-car-levels

plot_preds_thresh_car <- function(preds, car_level, title) {
  ggplot(
    preds |> filter(car == car_level),
    aes(x = face, y = .epred, fill = response, colour = response)
  ) +
    stat_lineribbon(alpha = 0.4, .width = c(0.66, 0.95)) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = thresh_colors) +
    scale_colour_manual(values = thresh_colors) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = y_range_thresh) +
    labs(
      title = title,
      x = "Face recognition (centred)", y = "Predicted threshold",
      fill = "Response", colour = "Response"
    ) +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")
}

p_thresh_car_lo <- plot_preds_thresh_car(preds_b2_thresh_res, -8, "Low car (-8)")
p_thresh_car_mid <- plot_preds_thresh_car(preds_b2_thresh_res, 0, "Average car (0)")
p_thresh_car_hi <- plot_preds_thresh_car(preds_b2_thresh_res, 8, "High car (+8)")

(p_thresh_car_lo | p_thresh_car_mid | p_thresh_car_hi) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect", axes = "collect") &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

ggsave(here("figures", "iid_ppreds", "preds_thresh_by_car-res.jpeg"), 
       width = 10, height = 7)
```

```{r}
#| label: ppreds-thresh-contrasts

p_contrasts_thresh <- ggplot(
  contrasts_thresh,
  aes(x = diff, y = model, fill = response, colour = response)
) +
  stat_halfeye(alpha = 0.7, .width = c(0.66, 0.95)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "darkgrey") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = thresh_colors) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = thresh_colors) +
  facet_wrap(~response, nrow = 1) +
  labs(
    title = "High > low face ability",
    x = "Difference in predicted threshold (high > low face)",
    y = NULL,
    fill = "Response", colour = "Response"
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

p_contrasts_thresh

ggsave(here("figures", "iid_ppreds", "preds_thresh_contrasts-res.jpeg"), 
       width = 8, height = 6)
```

```{r}
#| label: contrasts-threshold-diff

# threshold novel - learned gap at high vs low face
p_thresh_gap <- ggplot(
  thresh_gap_contrast,
  aes(x = gap_diff, y = model)
) +
  stat_halfeye(alpha = 0.7, .width = c(0.66, 0.95),
               fill = "skyblue") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "darkgrey") +
  labs(
    title = "Change in threshold by condition and high vs low face ability",
    x     = "Difference in threshold (high - low face)",
    y     = NULL,
    fill  = NULL, colour = NULL
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

p_thresh_gap

ggsave(here("figures", "iid_ppreds", "preds_thresh_cond_face_contrast-res.jpeg"),
       width = 8, height = 6)
```
